title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Hyatt India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Hyatt India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hyatt India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hyatt India:
Hyatt India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyatt India!
